productDisplayName: Status Quo Men Printed Black Tshirts
description: Composition Black sweatshirt made of 100% cotton, has a round ribbed neckline, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, distressed look graphic print on the front and a ribbed hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in warm water using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Warm and rugged is the perfect way to describe this black sweatshirt from status quo. The classic sweatshirt gets a dash of masculine edge with the distressed look graphic images and print on the front, while the soft fabric keeps you warm and comfortable. Team this with tees and jeans. Model statistics The model wears size M in sweatshirts Height: 6', Shoulders: 19"
